'''Wets Tranoj''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]] [[Police officer/Legends|police officer]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Tranjo investigated the disappearance of [[Simon Greyshade/Legends|Simon Greyshade's]] [[XJ-6 airspeeder/Legends|speeder]] and arrested [[Reymet Autem]] for the theft.

==Appearances==
*{{HoloNetNewsWeb|56|news/13516_5.html|Senate Speeder Thief Arrested}}
